Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
Encounter Records RIFs Codebook │ May 2025 │ V 1.7 117 

SRVC_MONTH 

LABEL: Service Month 

DESCRIPTION: The CCW-derived service month indicates the month and year when the service was provided, 
based on the claim through date (CLM_THRU_DT). 

SHORT NAME: SRVC_MONTH 

LONG NAME: SRVC_MONTH 

TYPE: DATE 

LENGTH: 6 

SOURCE: CCW 

FILE(S): IP base 
SNF base 
HH base 
OP base 
Carrier base 
DME base 

VALUES: 201501–201512
